quotes: Headline: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

"LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:" → bullets: *Increase your muscle strength* / *Improve your skin symptoms* / *Rely less on steroids* / *Do more of the activities you love*.
"Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease."
"...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position."
"LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required."

rules.intent: Maintain medical-legal-regulatory compliance across key brand and efficacy claims.
rules.rule_text: All messaging for the Campaign must adhere to the approved verbal patterns. Headline: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.". Benefits stem: "LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:" accompanied by the four bullets "Increase your muscle strength", "Improve your skin symptoms", "Rely less on steroids", and "Do more of the activities you love". Primary MOA: "Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.". Alternate MOA: "...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.". Administration copy: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.". Support Program name is strictly "My Compass Support".

effect.content: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

rules.intent: Standardize the doctor discussion conversion hook to aligned compliance copy.
